name: @intentsolutionsio/on-chain-analytics
description: Analyze on-chain metrics including whale movements, network activity, and holder distribution

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install on-chain-analytics\\n  or /plugin install on-chain-analytics@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
